features.name: Compression
features.description: The octopus can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The octopus can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Tentacles
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage.

reactions.name: Ink Cloud
reactions.description: (1/Day). Trigger: A creature ends its turn within 5 feet of the octopus while underwater. Response: The octopus releases ink that fills a 5-foot Cube centered on itself, and the octopus moves up to its Swim Speed. The Cube is Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

tactical_info.combat_role: Escape Artist - Small aquatic creature with compression and stealth
tactical_info.positioning: Uses compression to access tight spaces, ink cloud for escape
tactical_info.damage_output: 1 bludgeoning per hit, minimal combat threat
tactical_info.key_abilities: Compression allows 1-inch space movement, high stealth (+6)
tactical_info.weaknesses: Extremely low HP and damage, restricted to water
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for reconnaissance, escape scenarios, and tight space access
